chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-162 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case 28-07-2025 Mr. Bakhshan Khan Mahar, Advocate along with petitioner. M/s Syed Sardar Ali Shah, APG and Ghulam Abbas Kubar, AAG a/w DSP Muhammad Anwar, Ghotki and ASI Ghulam Rasool of A-section, Ghotki and i/C PP Mathelo/Moomal Ji Mari, P.S, A-section, Ghotki. **** Learned Law Officers while filing statements on behalf of DSP, Ghotki and i/C PP Mathelo/Moomal Ji Mari of P.S, A-section, Ghotki, submit that official respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law. After such statement, learned counsel for petitioner being satisfied seeks disposal of instant petition. Since the right of protection of every citizen including the petitioner is the fundamental right protected and guaranteed under the Constitution of Pakistan; therefore, official respondents are directed to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law. However, it is made clear that this order shall not come in the way either in criminal, civil or family cases, if pending between both the parties before the competent Courts of law. Accordingly, instant petition is disposed of along with listed applications in the above terms. JUDGE Ahmad
